name: Qingque
desc: Diviner of the Divination Commission on the Xianzhou Luofu, and a librarian.\nAlways slacks off and is about to be demoted to a "door guardian."

2.name: Sleep on the Tiles
2.desc: Every time Draw Tile is triggered, Qingque immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

3.name: Read Between the Tiles
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Right on the Tiles
4.desc: After using Skill, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>fixed chance</u> to gain "Self-Sufficer," lasting until the end of the current turn. \nWhile "Self-Sufficer" is active, using Basic ATK or Enhanced Basic ATK immediately launches 1 <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> on the same target, dealing Quantum DMG equal to <unbreak>100%</unbreak> of Basic ATK DMG or Enhanced Basic ATK DMG.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

30000002.name: Fixed Chance
30000002.desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

5.name: Gambit for the Tiles
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Prevail Beyond the Tiles
6.desc: Recovers 1 Skill Point after using Enhanced Basic ATK.

120101.name: Flower Pick
120101.desc: Tosses 1 jade tile from the suit with the fewest tiles in hand to deal Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Qingque's ATK to one designated enemy.
120101.simple_desc: Tosses a tile to deal minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

120102.name: A Scoop of Moon
120102.desc: Immediately draws <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> jade tile(s) and increases DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> until the end of the current turn. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s). The turn will not end after this Skill is used.
120102.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Draws tiles</color> and increases DMG dealt. <color=#f29e38ff>This turn does not end</color> after this action.

120103.name: A Quartet? Woo-hoo!
120103.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Qingque's ATK to all enemies, and obtains 4 jade tiles of the same suit.
120103.simple_desc: Deals Quantum DMG to all enemies, then obtains 4 tiles of the same suit.

120104.name: Celestial Jade
120104.desc: When an ally's turn starts, Qingque randomly draws 1 tile from 3 different suits and can hold up to 4 tiles at one time.\nIf Qingque starts her turn with 4 tiles of the same suit, she consumes all tiles to enter the "Hidden Hand" state.\nWhile in this state, Qingque cannot use her Skill again. At the same time, Qingque's ATK increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and her Basic ATK "Flower Pick" is enhanced, becoming "Cherry on Top!" The "Hidden Hand" state ends after using "Cherry on Top!".
120104.simple_desc: At the start of any ally's turn, draws a tile. At the start of this character's turn, if this character holds 4 tiles from the same suit, remove all tiles in possession and <color=#f29e38ff>Enhance this Basic ATK</color> while increasing this character's ATK.

120106.name: Attack
120106.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

120107.name: Game Solitaire
120107.desc: After using Technique, Qingque draws <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> jade tile(s) when the battle starts.
120107.simple_desc: After they use their Technique, draw tile(s) at the start of the next battle.

120108.name: Cherry on Top!
120108.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Qingque's ATK to one designated enemy, and deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Qingque's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.\n"Cherry on Top!" cannot recover Skill Points.
120108.simple_desc: Deals Quantum DMG to one enemy and minor Quantum DMG to enemies adjacent to it.

1.point_desc: Restores 1 Skill Point when using the Skill. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per battle.
Using the Skill increases DMG Boost effect of attacks by an extra <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
Qingque's SPD increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for 1 turn after using the Enhanced Basic ATK.
